prompt: Size FM-24 please — it needs an effort estimate before the development planner picks it up. I want both dev and QA points on it.
assertions: Calibrates before estimating: shows evidence of reading the effort value of at least 3 Done tickets from the board before producing the estimate
Produces SEPARATE Developer points and QA points, each with a stated effort-based reason
Sets the effort property using the board's observed scale value (Small / Medium / Large) via upsert-ticket-details.sh with --dry-run (captured in upsert-dry-run.txt)
Names at least 2 comparable tickets by key (FM-xx) that justify the estimate
QA estimate reasoning reflects the ticket's actual test burden (multi-element UI alignment against a Figma frame, Android+iOS visual verification) rather than restating the dev reasoning
Touches ONLY the effort property: no status/title/priority/description/body change in the dry-run payload; breakdown lives in the comment text, not the ticket body
